# Server Status Report

The production web server prod-web-01 in the us-east-1 region is currently operating at 78% CPU utilization with 12.4 GB of 16 GB memory in use and 234 GB of 500 GB disk space consumed, while maintaining a stable uptime of 45 days. The server is handling 127 active connections with a P99 latency of 145ms and experiencing only 3 errors per hour, indicating healthy overall performance. These metrics suggest the server is operating within acceptable parameters, though CPU usage should be monitored as it approaches higher threshold levels.
